This repository is a personal collection of project templates maintained for my own use.
I'm happy to hear about problems, but please keep in mind:

- I may not respond quickly, or at all
- Feature requests that don't align with my own needs are unlikely to be implemented
- Pull requests are not expected and may be closed without review

If you've found a bug or have a suggestion, feel free to describe it below -- but please
set your expectations accordingly.

**What actually happened?**
